song.title: Once By Nature
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Once by nature we were dead in sin, In a world of utter discord; But together God has quickened us, Raised us up to sit together with the Lord.
[V2] 2) Thus with all saints We can apprehend, All the vast dimensions of God. Knowing Christ's love Passes all we know, We're together filled To fullness with our God.
[V3] 3) Now we know the purpose of our God, Visible the mystery became: Christ, the church, together now we see, And together put the enemy to shame.
[V4] 4) For this cause We pray the Father God- Strengthen Thou with might Our inner man;|| Make Yourself at home In all our hearts, Root us, ground us in Your love And for Your plan.
[C] Chorus Jesus is getting us together, Come and see the saints in one accord. His love is knitting us together, To the stature of the fullness of the Lord.
[V5] 5) In the Body we'll be fitly framed As the many members Christ supply; Working in the measure of each part, All by growth in love the Body edify.
[V6] 6) Now we're one His purpose to fulfill, As the one new man of His plan. Unto Him be glory in the church, And in Jesus Christ forevermore-Amen!
song.author: Bob Brenneman, Rick and Barbara Coleman, Eric Larson, Tom and Rosie Yau
